holdings.infoBox: UPRO is an equity ETF with a total of 521 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro S&P500 (UPRO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides 3x leveraged daily exposure to a market cap-weighted index of large-cap and mid-cap US companies selected by the S&P Committee. UPRO was launched on Jun 25, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Evercore's Julian Emanuel on his bull case for S&P 500 reaching 9,000
data.text: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore, joins CNBC's 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss what's driving the markets, his bull case for the S&P 500, and more

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P500: Markets Weigh Iran Deal After Record Rally
data.text: The U.S. stock markets are steady as traders monitor Iran deal developments, key U.S. economic data, and whether tech leadership can continue.

data.title: These stocks have been beating the S&P 500 and could keep the bull market going, says Morgan Stanley
data.text: The bull market for stocks has been dogged by peak earnings revisions breadth and peak liquidity, but fear not says Morgan Stanley.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 and S&P500: Forecast Today as Iran Peace Deal Announcement Lifts US Stocks
data.text: US stocks rally as Iran peace deal announcement sends oil prices lower, while traders await the Fed decision and key economic data.

data.title: S&P 500 Outlook: Using Elliott Wave Analysis to Spot Key Market Turning Points
data.text: A multi-day bounce is underway, nearing its end, to be followed by another decline. Elliott Wave analysis accurately anticipated recent moves, forecasting the three-step corrective bounce.

data.title: S&P 500, SPY, VOO, IVV outlook: top news to watch this week
data.text: The S&P 500 Index and its top ETFs, like State Street's SPY, Vanguard's VOO, and BlackRock's IVV jumped for two consecutive days. It jumped to $7,430, up modestly from this month's low of $7,240.

data.title: S&P 500 and Dow Jones Forecast: SPX Eyes 8,000 as Fed and Tariff Risks Rise
data.text: The S&P 500 and Dow Jones remain bullish, but Fed uncertainty, sticky inflation, tariff risks, and AI spending pressures may make the rally more selective.

data.title: S&P500: SpaceX IPO and Iran Deal Set Stage for Market Volatility
data.text: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures rise as Iran peace hopes and SpaceX's record IPO fuel market volatility and reshape investor sentiment.

data.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it

data.title: The S&P 500 chart is breaking down — but this new buy signal is flashing green
data.text: A look behind the stock market's key support levels shows bullish NYSE activity and a hidden shift in volatility.

data.title: S&P500 Forecast: Tech Stocks Bounce as Iran Tensions Test Market Gains
data.text: US stocks rebound as chip stocks surge, but Trump's Iran threat caps gains. See how PPI data and tech strength are shaping the market outlook.

data.title: S&P 500 Index: Iran Threats, 4% Inflation and Chip Rout Sink Stocks
data.text: US stocks fell as Iran tensions, inflation above 4%, and a chip sell-off pressured the S&P 500 and Dow. See what's driving markets.

data.title: S&P500 and Nasdaq 100: US Stocks Forecast Hinges on CPI and Iran Risks
data.text: US stocks fell as Iran strikes lifted oil prices ahead of key CPI data. Find out what inflation means for the S&P 500 and Nasdaq outlook.

data.title: S&P500: Chip Rally Lifts Futures, but Can Bulls Hold Key Support?
data.text: S&P 500 futures rose before the opening bell as chip stocks rebounded, while investors monitored Middle East tensions and key technical levels.

data.title: S&P 500 at 8000? A Chip Correction?
data.text: Stocks got a big scare last week. There's disagreement on what happens next on Wall Street.

data.title: The Stock Market Just Got Crushed. Why Citi Is Raising Its S&P 500 Target.
data.text: Citi strategist Scott Chronert lifted his year-end S&P 500 target to 8100, arguing that strong earnings growth and AI spending continue to outweigh macroeconomic risks.

data.title: Citigroup boosts S&P 500 forecast as AI-led growth supports equities
data.text: Citigroup has become the latest Wall Street brokerage to raise its year-end 2026 target for the S&P 500, forecasting the benchmark index will surpass the 8,000 level as strong corporate earnings and a...

data.title: S&P 500 companies can't stop talking about higher oil prices. But few say they'll actually hit profits.
data.text: Listen to a few earnings calls this season, and you'll get the sense that CEOs are worried about high oil prices as the Iran war continues. But a look at the numbers shows those anxieties haven't had ...

data.title: For the first time ever, an S&P 500 ETF has over $1 trillion in assets. Here's why that should worry you.
data.text: Vanguard's S&P 500 ETF has become the first exchange-traded fund, or indeed the first mutual fund of any kind, to hold more than $1 trillion in assets.

data.title: An S&P 500 shakeup is hours away. These stocks could soon earn spots in the index.
data.text: Marvell, Reddit and a mortgage “dark horse” could make the cut during the next quarterly rebalancing of the benchmark index.

data.title: In ‘wild' twist, SpaceX won't be allowed early entry to the S&P 500 after all
data.text: S&P Dow Jones Indices considered whether to loosen index requirements but opted to keep its policies unchanged.

data.title: Don't rule out a ‘June swoon' — the S&P 500 is pushing its limits
data.text: Some potentially volatile earning reports land next week, led by Oracle ORCL+2.61%, which had a 35% move after earnings three quarters ago. Additionally, Chewy CHWY-1.05% and RH RH+0.52% have also bee...

data.title: The End Of S&P 500 As We Know It
data.text: Starting Monday, some of the world's most popular ETFs may have to make room for SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic, and other money-losing tech giants once they go public, thanks to new index rules from S&P D...

data.title: The Tech Rally Is Running Out of Gas. Where the S&P 500 Goes From Here.
data.text: Tech stocks are balking at good sector earnings. That's a bit worrying.

data.title: How single-stock turbulence presents ‘asymmetric' downside risk for a rather calm S&P 500
data.text: A “dispersion trade” is being fueled by rising volatility for individual stocks while index volatility is falling — suggesting the risks of a selloff are rising
